name: Idiomatic & Standard Patterns
description: Write standard, idiomatic code. No clever tricks.
content:
## Code Style: Idiomatic & Standard Patterns

- Write code that a new team member can understand without explanation.
- Follow the language's official style guide and community conventions.
- No premature abstraction — three similar lines of code is better than a premature helper.
- No magic numbers — use named constants.
- Error handling is not optional. Every error must be checked and either handled or explicitly propagated.
- Comments explain *why*, not *what*. Code should be self-documenting.
